messages.content:
Hey Lu,

Just a quick message to let you know that my old band will be in Newcastle on the 5th of November, and we're keen to jump up for a couple of tunes at the Creative Creature Open Mic Night if there's room!

We're a 4-pieceâguitar, drums, bass, and keys. We might also use a mic for some random vocals. I'll attach a Spotify link below for you to check out.

Let me know if you have any questions or if there's anything we need to sort out ahead of time.

Cheers, Tim
